description_text: Carbon Fiber Rear Bumper Lip FOR AUDI The Rear Bumper Lip is one of the simplest mods you can do to the exterior of your car that will give your car that completely different look. Not only are spoilers meant for great looks, they also help Prevent the rear of the car from scratching. Fitment: Fit for Audi S4 Sedan 2008 2009 2010 2011 2012 (Pre-facelift),not for Audi A4 B8 Base/Sline Models Specifications: Product Name: Rear Bumper Lip Material: Carbon Fiber Package Size: 149*42*20cm Package Weight: 4.36kg Features: • Made of High Quality Lightweight Carbon Fiber. • Improve the aerodynamic characteristics by enhancing the transition between the high-speed airflow below the vehicle and the free airflow in the surrounding atmosphere. • Provide space for the airflow under the vehicle to decelerate and expand, thereby providing pressure recovery by providing a degree of "wake fill" or more accurately. • Does not cause excessive airflow separation and resistance and keep driving safety. • Sport style rear diffuser, perfect for decoration, increase both road safety and racing style. Package included: • Car Rear Lip Bumper Body Kits with break light • Mounting Accessories
